div.h3: Data-Oriented Design: Component Signature Grouping & Memory Layout
div.h1: Precise byte layouts for engineering implementation
div.p: pos_only: "Archetype [Pos]\n(ID: 0x1)" { style.fill: "#E8F4E8" header: "Columnar Store: Position" table: |md | Row | Entity ID | x (f32) | y (f32) | | :-- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | 0 | 0 | 12.5 | 44.0 | | 1 | 1 | 0.0 | -1.2 |

g.text: Internal Procedure: Migration(Entity E, Archetype Target)
Dense packing: No gaps between Row 0 and 1

ol.li: Lock Archetype Source and Target mutexes.
Locate Row $i$ in Source via EntityRegistry.
Allocate Row $j$ in Target (expand vector<T> if needed).

Memcpy intersection of component data:
Target[j].Pos = Source[i].Pos
Target[j].Vel = Source[i].Vel "5. Initialize New Component": "Target[j].NewComp = Default."

Defragment Source:
LastEntity = ArchetypeSource.Entities.back()
ArchetypeSource.Table[i] = ArchetypeSource.Table.back()
EntityRegistry[LastEntity].RowIndex = i
ArchetypeSource.Table.pop_back() "7. Update Registry": "EntityRegistry[E] = {Target, j}."
